positive: Minimalist geometric composition featuring abstract planets and constellations made of flowing organic shapes, rendered in a clean, modern style. The primary color palette is deep midnight blue, cyan, and warm gold accents, contrasted against crisp white negative space. The celestial bodies should have soft, illuminated edges and deep, velvety gradients. Composition must be centrally balanced and highly symmetrical, suitable for a seamless repeat pattern. Vector art influence, perfect for screen printing on apparel. High contrast, excellent visibility, clean silhouettes, depth of field, detailed texture, ultra-hd, bright lighting.
negative: blur, grainy, noise, watermark, text, logo, signature, deformed, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, muddy colors, dark background, photo-realistic, realistic photography
